notes: Production runtime intentionally remains CC7.5.25 legacy layered loader.
AdminKit Core is still side-by-side and not active globally in production webhook routing.
/debug/core-timings now shows recent Core callback and manual-send timing events.
Callback timing includes totalMs, ackMs, beforeAckMs, renderMs, deliveryMs, ackOk.
Manual-send timing includes totalMs, setupMs, renderMs, deliveryMs.
Use timings to compare slow main.home callback with manual-send main.home and identify whether delay is render or MAX delivery/client rendering.
main.home callback still skips stateManager.resetSession; reset is kept only for true start/menu text/bot_started events.
Next migration step: redeploy, click Core buttons, then open /debug/core-timings?limit=10.
